summary: Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting their positions, and later eliminated a Russian soldier who attempted to fake surrender and flee back to his comrades. In the Kostiantynivka direction, Ukrainian 36th Marine Brigade soldiers survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with one soldier holding a drone detector at 0:11 in footage, suggesting they were aware of the targeting. Russian operators from the "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 191 Ukrainian targets on April 13 and 193 on April 14, including fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, across multiple sectors including Donbas, Belgorod, Sumy, and Krasny Liman.
